checks.name: origin_preserved
checks.explanation: Origin reference is present and meaningful.

checks.name: evidence_state_present
checks.explanation: Evidence state or evidence reference is present and meaningful.

checks.name: transformation_trace_present
checks.explanation: Transformation history is present and meaningful.

checks.name: environment_context_present
checks.explanation: Environment context is present and meaningful.

checks.name: final_record_valid
checks.explanation: Experiment run record contains minimum structural metadata.

conclusion: Difference retention is preserved. Origin, evidence state, transformation history, environment context, and structural metadata remain available for interpretation.
